text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my day off. I'm headed back home after some
shopping when...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Don't worry about it. It's nothing,
really.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's just... there were roadworks on my usual
jogging route, so I couldn't go that way...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And everywhere else I went was the
same—roadworks or closed off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka stands there, shoulders slumped in
defeat, rain pitter-pattering against her.
